column2: Verification of Impartiality and Avoidance of Conflicts of Interest for Trainers and Assessors
column3: ['Identify the trainers and assessors involved in assessment activities. ', 'Verify that no financial type incentives are affecting their remuneration. ', 'Ensure trainers and assessors are free from any other pressures or incentives that could affect their judgement. ']
column4: ['A list of identified trainers and assessors participating in assessment activities. ', 'Confirmation that the remuneration for each trainer or assessor is not contingent on the number of assessments carried out or on the results of such assessments. ', 'Confirmation that there are no other pressures or incentives, beyond financial type incentives, affecting the judgement or assessment results of each trainer or assessor. ']
